title: Supply Chain Manager - Imperial Logistics India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Imperial Logistics India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Imperial Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Imperial Logistics India:
Imperial Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Imperial Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
